Dr.Rajesh Naik and his team of healthcare professionals are dedicated in providing comprehensive and compassionate dental care to patients of all age groups. We are proud to announce that our clinic has upgraded to complete digital work flow from  diagnosis during the first visit of patient to treatment planning and execution. Everything has completely gone ” DIGITAL” . We are in upbeat with the latest technology and our scanners use AI technology  which helps in creating  a precise digital workflow from start to end thereby facilitating us to deliver a seamless and amazing treatment experience to our esteemed clients. Fresh Breath dental clinic is located in the posh residential locales of Kalyan nagar, very close to the very famous commercial hub Kammanahalli. Patient’s  comfort is our top priority. Our goal is to give the best quality dental care to you and your family in a very calm and serene atmosphere. We believe in establishing a relationship with our patients built on mutual trust and respect. We do this by listening to our patients in detail and working with them in all the best possible way, so that we can to help them achieve their dental goals quicker . We are committed in delivering a positive dental experience to the patient and their entire family. Our primary objective is  family-focused, comprehensive, treatment of the entire mouth. Many people do not know it, but healthy gums and teeth are essential to the total health and well-being of an individual. My concentration is on education and prevention so that my patients can avoid disease and better manage their own oral healthcare. Thank you and see you soon! Dr.Rajesh Naik and his Team Advanced Technology We offer the most advanced technology in DENTAL IMPLANTS ,COSMETIC  & FAMILY DENTISTRY. Ranging from regular cleanings to consultations, Dental Implants with computer guided technology , Use of modern technologies and state of the art tools like the Intraoral Scanners with built in AI which facilitate to provide excellent experience for our patients with absolutely no discomfort. CAD CAM Zirconia crowns. Full mouth Rehabilitation for patients with IMPLANTS , Invisible braces  Indian and imported [ INVISALIGN ] treatment, Teeth Whitening , Root Canal treatment , Crowns & Bridges and Veneers are some examples of what we use to redesign our patients’ smiles. DID U KNOW? Dental stem cells have the potential to repair damage caused by-Heart Attack, Diabetes, Osteoarthritis, Fractures, Parkinson’s and many more…. Dental stem cells are collected from milk teeth  of children aged 6-12 years and healthy wisdom teeth of young adults. Our clinic is one of the authorised centre for collection of dental stem cells .
